title: Copis TPA
description: A TPA project, you can tpa to people.
body:
#

Copis TPA

# Features ## Send Teleport Requests - Players can send a teleport request to another player using `/tpa `. - Requests are sent as clickable messages with `[Accept]` and `[Deny]` buttons. ## Accept or Deny Requests - `/tpaccept ` accepts a teleport request and teleports the sender after a 5-second countdown. - `/tpdeny ` denies a request, notifying both players. ## Countdown Teleportation - Teleports include a 5-second countdown with messages and portal particle effects. - Enderman teleport sound is played for both players. ## Request Expiry - TPA requests expire after 30 seconds if not accepted. - Prevents sending requests to yourself or to offline players. Works on Fabric and compatible plugin servers.
